title: Chemical constituents of Coriaria nepalensis Wall.
author: N. P. Rai
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Central Department of Chemistry, Tribhuvan University, Kirtipur, Nepal 
Showa Pharmaceutical University, Machida, Tokyo-194-8543. Japan 
 Manuscript received 19 January 2004, revised 14 March 2005, accepted 5 May 2005  

 Isolation of known compounds hexacosyl-p-coumarate, oleanolic acid, ursolic acid and stigmasterol glucoside and bryonolic acid have been reported fur the first time from the aerial parts of  Coriaria nepalensis  Wall.
